summary: Phase 2 (Fidelity Fabián Arenas) end-to-end tested: dark theme branding, multi-matriculas, client edit/delete, invoice CRUD and monedero virtual (acumular_2 / acumular_4 / gastar_saldo). 19/19 backend tests pass; full Playwright UI flow passes.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: deprecated FastAPI on_event('startup'/'shutdown') used; migrate to lifespan handlers when convenient (non-blocking).
Frontend Fidelizacion.jsx uses window.confirm for delete invoice. UX-only suggestion: replace with AlertDialog like client deletion for consistency.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' while allow_credentials=True; in production set CORS_ORIGINS explicitly to avoid CORS-with-credentials browser rejection.
Cookie set_auth_cookie uses samesite='none' + secure=True which is correct for the cross-origin preview, but make sure production also serves over HTTPS — already does in this env.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_crm_api.py (rewrote tests for Phase 2: matriculas list, edit/delete, monedero tipo)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all critical flows: login branding, multi-matriculas add/remove, submit, edit client, fidelizacion calc acumular_2 / gastar_saldo, save invoices updating saldo, delete client)

seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed 'TEST_' created during tests. Final client 'TEST UI Edited ...' was deleted in cleanup step. Some 'TEST Cliente' rows from backend pytest remain (they are non-destructive).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test runner needs REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported (frontend/.env). Use: `export $(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env) && pytest /app/backend/tests/test_crm_api.py -v`. data-testids work as documented. Monedero math validated end-to-end: acumular_2/4 add saldo and importe_final = importe_con_iva (no discount), gastar_saldo subtracts min(saldo, importe_con_iva) from importe_con_iva. Delete invoice reverts saldo correctly. Backwards compat for legacy 'matricula' string is normalized in _normalize_client.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failures found. Initial pytest collection error was due to REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL not being exported in shell; fixed by exporting it before invocation, no code change needed.
